# Arthur A. Sabintsev

> Physicist, engineer, and founder. CEO of Grove. Founder of Gold Ranger Ventures. A career spanning physics research, software engineering at major institutions, and technology entrepreneurship.

## About
Arthur Ariel Sabintsev is a physicist turned software engineer turned founder and CEO. He leads [Grove](https://grove.city) as CEO and founded [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz). His career spans physics research, mobile and web engineering at organizations including the Washington Post and Capital One, and leadership in decentralized infrastructure at Pocket Network.

## Current Work

### Grove
- **Role:** CEO
- **Website:** [grove.city](https://grove.city)

### Gold Ranger Ventures
- **Role:** Founder
- **Website:** [goldranger.xyz](https://goldranger.xyz)

## Career History

### Pocket Network (2018–2026)
- Decentralized infrastructure protocol
- **Website:** [pocket.network](https://pocket.network)

### Capital One (2018–2022)
- Financial services and technology
- **Website:** [capitalone.com](https://capitalone.com)

### Washington Post (2015–2018)
- News media and publishing technology
- **Website:** [washingtonpost.com](https://washingtonpost.com)

### ID.me (2013–2015)
- Digital identity verification
- **Website:** [id.me](https://id.me)

## Background
Arthur's background is in physics, with a career trajectory from research into software engineering and ultimately into founding and leading technology companies. He has experience across mobile development, web engineering, decentralized infrastructure, and venture building.
